name: Metal and Marble Coffee Table White Carrara Marble/Dark Bronze - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Bring timeless elegance to your living room or kitchen with this Metal and Marble Coffee Table Carrara Marble from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. The rectangular tabletop is crafted from white Carrara marble for a clean, refined look, while the dark bronze-finish steel frame adds warm contrast and support. Plus, a crisscross base lends structure and a touch of modern style.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
